72921d97-21d1-47e1-a17f-3f16e49538a7.title: The Sacred Life of a Webcomic Artist
72921d97-21d1-47e1-a17f-3f16e49538a7.author: Jooya
72921d97-21d1-47e1-a17f-3f16e49538a7.description: Imagine you were a once-famous adult webcomic artist going through a career slump. Would you rather work with your stunningly sexy but jerk of a producer, Jooho, or your first love and story writer, Minjoon? Well, Hayoon has to work with both! With bills to pay and nothing but ramyun to eat after a string of failed series, Hayoon must successfully launch a new title with both of them on her team. Will she be able to navigate this professional nightmare and revive her career with a bang? And which man will end up taking the spot of her male lead?

e5eb4105-1b15-41d1-b455-5ee39977414f.title: Plaything
e5eb4105-1b15-41d1-b455-5ee39977414f.author: Q-Boy
e5eb4105-1b15-41d1-b455-5ee39977414f.description: Lee Myung-jun, Wakil Ketua Grup Hyun-do, kehilangan putrinya karena sekelompok pembully. Untuk membalas dendam, dia mengadopsi Yoon Karma, seorang gadis pembelot psikopat. Yoon Karma: Senjata manusia sadis yang diciptakan melalui eksperimen narkoba di Korea Utara. Setelah membunuh semua orang di laboratorium penelitian, dia melarikan diri ke Korea Selatan sendirian. Baru saja dibebaskan dari pusat penahanan remaja di Korea Selatan, Yoon Karma bertekad memburu para pembully di sekolah, didorong oleh keinginan untuk membalaskan dendam ayah barunya dan memuaskan kesenangan sadisnya.

59cfe5bf-f5cf-446d-b02e-e83cca8fffcc.title: The Hip Guy
59cfe5bf-f5cf-446d-b02e-e83cca8fffcc.author: Henie
59cfe5bf-f5cf-446d-b02e-e83cca8fffcc.description: 27-year-old Ga-eun Seong has everything that money can buy, but she can’t rest until her athleisure company is the best in the industry. That’s why she hires Chan Gwak to model her new leggings line for men. Chan has the perfect butt, but is it perfect enough to meet Ga-eun's high standards? After social media interactions have people thinking they’re dating, Ga-eun begins to question... even though Chan’s not her type, could she end up falling for him anyway?

47817452-70cf-4590-9901-05fa0c717397.title: Unholy Blood
47817452-70cf-4590-9901-05fa0c717397.author: KIM Jung-Hyun, LIM Lina
47817452-70cf-4590-9901-05fa0c717397.description: When vampires destroy her chance to have the normal life she’s always wanted, Hayan is forced to draw on her darkest secret to rid the world of the merciless hunters that took it over 10 years ago. With the support of a rising star in the local police force, Hayan steps up to protect her loved ones, face her past, and get her revenge.

d90db2e6-72f8-4351-97b9-45b5d8b3ee07.title: Special Civil Servant
d90db2e6-72f8-4351-97b9-45b5d8b3ee07.author: Kwon Sora, Seo Jaewon
d90db2e6-72f8-4351-97b9-45b5d8b3ee07.description: Socially-awkward Maru Han bombs his fifth attempt at getting a dream job in the civil service. But after a strange creature attacks him in the mountains, he finds himself recruited into the Special Civil Service for the Ministry of Environment. This secret organization is dedicated to fighting nachal, human-devouring demons who appear in clouds of yellow dust. As Maru struggles in his new job fighting nachal, he must find out why they're mysteriously drawn to him before the prophesied end of the world arrives.

6c79905f-5bf6-4cda-aa51-9f9624d60d3b.title: Fog Land, NIME
6c79905f-5bf6-4cda-aa51-9f9624d60d3b.author: POGO
6c79905f-5bf6-4cda-aa51-9f9624d60d3b.description:
Fogland, sebuah penjara internasional yang misterius, menjebak Kang Dante, seorang guru sains yang dikirim untuk membina para narapidana.
Saat kerusuhan mendadak terjadi.
Satu-satunya jalan baginya untuk keluar: MENJADI SEORANG PEMIMPIN.

3fed87f5-5bc8-44c6-92c3-e2331c3fb99c.title: To Not Die
3fed87f5-5bc8-44c6-92c3-e2331c3fb99c.author: Parae
3fed87f5-5bc8-44c6-92c3-e2331c3fb99c.description: Dajun is bullied every single day at school. Desperate, he believes taking his own life will end his torment but soon realizes it's not him who deserves to die... it's all the scumbags in this world. And when an incident with his bullies forces him to have to fend for himself on the streets, Dajun sets out for revenge. To do so, he’ll need to become strong. But he quickly learns that school bullies aren’t his greatest enemy… he’s now got bigger fish to fry.  Part of the Blue String Universe

54dfbeb5-4249-4057-945b-04d792117294.title: Anon, I Know You!
54dfbeb5-4249-4057-945b-04d792117294.author: LICO
54dfbeb5-4249-4057-945b-04d792117294.description: What if the school's anonymous message board shows real names only to me? Every day various secrets are uploaded anonymously on the school's anonymous app 'Secretly'. 'Min-ju' who has a crush on his childhood friend of ten years 'Ha-young', ends up seeing all the real names on anonymous posts because of an error while downloading 'Secretly' and discovers that 'Ki-joo', the boyfriend of 'Ha-young' is cheating on her...

45b88caa-7656-4856-9f47-20cd34820b0f.title: Love Me More
45b88caa-7656-4856-9f47-20cd34820b0f.author: Kim In-Jeong
45b88caa-7656-4856-9f47-20cd34820b0f.description: Under the shadow of controlling parents, Lee Bom lives a life of abundance, yet she remains unstable. Then, before her eyes, appears Jaehyun from her memories, and her once-innocent life begins to shake. This is the story of Lee Bom’s first love, as she struggles to find what she truly wants, to be loved, and to love in return.

fd1ab0b7-6d44-41b8-b0aa-58d19b1c617f.title: Beware of Love
fd1ab0b7-6d44-41b8-b0aa-58d19b1c617f.author: Yoanna
fd1ab0b7-6d44-41b8-b0aa-58d19b1c617f.description: Nayun, a college freshman, only approached the drummer of the campus band 3DAYS to help her best friend get closer to him. But when the band’s handsome vocalist, Seolu, unexpectedly confesses to her that same night, Nayun’s simple plan takes a surprising turn. Convinced that she’s not ready for a relationship, she tells Seolu she’s not looking to date anyone, though her racing heart suggests otherwise. Unfazed, Seolu suggests they just be “good friends” instead. Between his teasing charm and her own conflicted feelings, Nayun soon finds that staying just friends might be harder than she thought.

61e62071-ea2a-4c23-bc74-a1b801c5d220.title: Date First, Love Later
61e62071-ea2a-4c23-bc74-a1b801c5d220.author: Jungmi
61e62071-ea2a-4c23-bc74-a1b801c5d220.description: Jaerim Lee, a student in film studies major, needed a way to quiet down the rumors that he's into guys. Gaeun Cha, a student in screenwriting major, needed to get away from the dorky senior who was always hitting on her. The two of them begin a contractual relationship to solve their problems, but as they get to know each other, Gaeun starts to fall for Jaerim’s charm little by little...

750be812-1083-4474-a5ce-aa63e075a09c.title: We're Soulmates Starting From Today
750be812-1083-4474-a5ce-aa63e075a09c.author: NOH Seung-A
750be812-1083-4474-a5ce-aa63e075a09c.description: Rising stars and longtime childhood friends, "So Dakyung" and "Ji Minwoo."  The scandalous open 'business relationship' is rapidly evolving to 'marriage'!  But somewhere in this whole marriage, is something a little suspicious.  "Before the summer you turn 29, you must succeed in marrying So Dakyung."  What kind of story did he have with his old note?

6700a238-c7ea-443a-b0b0-a4cc4a3be135.title: To My First Love
6700a238-c7ea-443a-b0b0-a4cc4a3be135.author: Lise
6700a238-c7ea-443a-b0b0-a4cc4a3be135.description: After the loss of a loved one, Jisu is offered a helping hand from her late grandmother’s student, who provides her with a place to stay and takes her under her wing. Despite her wish to get along, Jisu gets off on the wrong foot with their only son, Hajin, who mistakes her for a stalker after he encounters her on his doorstep. Will Jisu be able to resolve this misunderstanding and befriend Hajin? Or will their relationship turn into something more?

317d6f2e-8f66-4db7-98d8-576beb6d2433.title: Days of Our Love
317d6f2e-8f66-4db7-98d8-576beb6d2433.author: Ma Chérie, Taego
317d6f2e-8f66-4db7-98d8-576beb6d2433.description: Nahee is sent to bring food to Hyunjin, the chaebol heir just back from England. She dreads seeing the boy she used to roughhouse with, yet feels sorry for how lonely his glittering penthouse seems—until he corners her and blurts, “How can I see you as just a friend when you’re so damn pretty?”

3c66ef2e-7a98-4f06-847a-7a2a9760bf91.title: I Will Change the Ending
3c66ef2e-7a98-4f06-847a-7a2a9760bf91.author: Mokappang
3c66ef2e-7a98-4f06-847a-7a2a9760bf91.description: Byun Soo-ah, an impoverished novelist who only writes bad endings, is possessed by someone's curse as Choi Se-hwa, the villain of 'End of Youth', which is currently being serialized. Can Su-ah survive and return to her original world in a novel full of traitors, sociopaths, double personalities, and psychopaths?
